rules.name: no_console_in_production
rules.description: console.log is not allowed in Node.js production code — use Winston/Pino
rules.message: console.log/debug detected in Node.js backend. Use a structured logger (Winston, Pino).
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace with logger.info() / logger.debug() from your configured Winston/Pino instance.

rules.name: route_paths_lowercase
rules.description: Express route paths should be lowercase with hyphens
rules.message: Route path contains uppercase characters. Use lowercase-with-hyphens convention.
rules.fix_suggestion: Rename to lowercase: router.get('/user-profile/:id', ...) instead of '/UserProfile/:id'.

rules.name: validate_all_api_inputs
rules.description: Every route handler should validate request body, params, and query
rules.message: POST/PUT/PATCH route handler may be missing input validation. Use Joi, Zod, or express-validator.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add a validation middleware: router.post('/path', validationMiddleware(schema), controller).

rules.name: no_secrets_in_source_node
rules.description: Secrets must never be hardcoded in Node.js source
rules.message: Hardcoded secret in Node.js source. Load from env.json or environment variables.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use process.env.JWT_SECRET and store the value in env.json or a secret manager.

rules.name: use_async_await
rules.description: Prefer async/await over callbacks and .then() chains
rules.message: Promise .then() chain found. Prefer async/await for cleaner error handling.
rules.fix_suggestion: Refactor to async/await: try { const result = await somePromise(); } catch (e) { ... }

rules.name: centralized_error_handling
rules.description: Avoid sending raw error objects or stack traces to the client
rules.message: Raw error stack/message sent to client — may leak internal details.
rules.fix_suggestion: Return a sanitised error payload: { success: false, message: 'Something went wrong', code: 500 }.

rules.name: sanitize_string_inputs
rules.description: String inputs should be sanitised to prevent XSS and injection
rules.message: req.body/query/params used without visible sanitisation. Ensure inputs are validated and sanitised.
rules.fix_suggestion: Sanitise with express-validator or xss-clean before using request data.
rules.comment: Disabled by default — high false-positive rate. Enable selectively per project.
